title: GitHub - Adriano-goes/ahp-worldcup-2026: A reproducible AHP (Analytic Hierarchy Process) model ranking favorites for the FIFA World Cup 2026. Criteria and consistency checks are built in Excel; a minimal Python script reads the Results sheet, exports a sorted CSV, and generates a horizontal bar chart with in-bar percentage labels.
original_text:
Use the Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP) to rank national teams for the FIFA World Cup 2026.
All scoring logic and checks are kept in Excel; Python reads the Results sheet, exports a CSV, and generates the chart.

Note: Weights come from Saaty’s pairwise comparisons and are validated with a consistency check.

Install dependencies
pip install -r requirements.txt

Generate CSV + chart
python run_ahp_worldcup.py

A reproducible AHP (Analytic Hierarchy Process) model ranking favorites for the FIFA World Cup 2026. Criteria and consistency checks are built in Excel; a minimal Python script reads the Results sheet, exports a sorted CSV, and generates a horizontal bar chart with in-bar percentage labels.
